title: JSA acts on Bacancy Systems Series A fundraise
description: Bacancy Systems Private Limited has raised ₹40 crore from a Series A fundraise led by Sabre Partners and Greenstone Capital.JSA Advocates & Solicitors advised both Sabre Partners and Greenstone Capital.The transaction team was led by Prakriti Jaiswal (Partner), with support from Nabarun Ray (Principal Associate) and Associates Mahi Jaiswal and Kirti Vardhan Singh.Prakriti JaiswalBacancy Systems is an R&D-led electronics manufacturing company, specialises in embedded systems and power ele
